title: ida labelloviridis
intro_study: According to "Phytotherapy research : PTR", ida labelloviridis benefits include enhancing the production of anti-inflammatory interleukin-10 (IL-10), which implies it may have anti-inflammatory properties.
side_effects: Ida labelloviridis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to the high concentration of toxic alkaloids present in the plant. Other side effects may include headaches, dizziness, and increased heart rate, which can be a result of the plant's stimulant properties. In severe cases, improper use of Ida labelloviridis can lead to more serious complications, such as liver damage, kidney failure, and even respiratory failure. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedy to avoid these potential side effects.
